name: Buggy Racing
description: Buggy Racing is an exciting off-road driving game packed with speed, fun, and adventure! Choose from 3 unique buggies and 3 different characters, each with their own style. Explore 3 thrilling game modes: Race against opponents in Racing Mode, beat the clock in Time Lap Mode, or survive as long as you can in Endless Mode. Drive through challenging tracks, avoid obstacles, and prove your skills. Enjoy smooth controls, engaging gameplay, and fast-paced action in this ultimate buggy racing experience!
instructions: Buggy Racing offers smooth and easy-to-use controls for both mobile and keyboard players giving you full control of your buggy in every situation On mobile use the on-screen buttons to move left and right control speed and navigate through challengin
